$schema-note: Asset swap-in manifest for Kudbee Contra. Map a logical key to a file path relative to this assets/ folder. A NON-EMPTY path loads that image and overrides the procedural placeholder; an EMPTY string keeps the code-drawn placeholder. See docs/ASSET_PIPELINE.md. Drop production/AI-generated art into the matching subfolder, set its path here, and it renders with zero code changes.
